stages.description: Speak to the Thief Guild Master and learn the art of pickpocketing.
Pickpocket 5 different NPCs. (Thief Guild L1+. Sneak at L6+ improves success.)
Pickpocket a Noble or higher-tier NPC. (Higher gold reward, higher caught risk.)
You are a master pickpocket! Sneak ability now fully available at L6.
Scope out the Royal Bank. Speak to the patrons and observe the guards.
Reach Thief Guild Level 12. The robbery requires ultimate confidence.
Take a bank guard hostage and demand the vault be opened. (Small fail chance → jail.)
Escape with the vault loot! (Vault Loot Bag + Gold Bars added to inventory.)
Find a locked chest or drawer in a home. (Thief Guild L3+. Hide at L9 improves success.)
Successfully steal 10 different items from homes without getting caught.
Steal from 5 wealthy homes (noble-tier containers). Caught chance is higher!
You are a master home thief! Hide ability fully unlocked at L9.
A bulletin board notice describes 12 colored towers scattered across the land. Find the first tower.
Defeat the Red Tower Grandmaster and collect the Red Crystal.
Defeat the Orange Tower Grandmaster and collect the Orange Crystal.
Defeat the Yellow Tower Grandmaster and collect the Yellow Crystal.
Defeat the Purple Tower Grandmaster and collect the Purple Crystal.
Defeat the White Tower Grandmaster and collect the White Crystal.
Defeat the Gold Tower Grandmaster and collect the Gold Crystal.
Defeat the Silver Tower Grandmaster and collect the Silver Crystal.
Defeat the Azure Tower Grandmaster and collect the Azure Crystal.
Defeat the Green Tower Grandmaster and collect the Green Crystal.
Defeat the Brown Tower Grandmaster and collect the Brown Crystal.
Defeat the Emerald Tower Grandmaster and collect the Emerald Crystal.
Defeat the Teal Tower Grandmaster and collect the Teal Crystal.
Bring all 12 crystals to the Crystal Grandmaster and complete the quest.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the house. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the house.
Defeat the Ghost Lord to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The house is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the mansion. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the mansion.
Defeat the Wraith King to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The mansion is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the prison. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the prison.
Defeat the Phantom Warden to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The prison is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the graveyard. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the graveyard.
Defeat the Lich Overlord to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The graveyard is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the crypt. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the crypt.
Defeat the Vampire Prince to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The crypt is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board notice warns of undead in the mausoleum. Investigate.
Defeat 10 undead creatures inside the mausoleum.
Defeat the Death Knight to fully cleanse this haunted place.
The mausoleum is cleansed! You've earned a proper reward.
A bulletin board hint: a witch in the swamp may know of your sister. Find her.
Gather 4 monster ingredients: Bog Eye, Serpent Fang, Lizard Claw, Toad Tongue.
Gather 2 rare herb ingredients from the swamp search areas (Keys_witch).
Return all 6 ingredients to the Swamp Witch.
The witch brews a Vision Potion showing Sunny heading toward a dark cave.
Follow the witch's vision to the Drow cave entrance.
Complete the Drow Guard's entrance quest.
Complete the Drow Leader's quest to access the witch.
Gather all 12 ingredients for the Drow Witch's teleport spell.
The Drow Witch casts the spell. You are transported to Lloth's realm.
Speak to the Drow God Lloth.
Enter the volcano and settle the dragon dispute by completing all adult dragon quests.
Return to Lloth via the ring once all 10 adult dragon quests are complete.
Lloth reveals: your sister Sunny was transformed into a Drow Elf. A tent ring was lost. Find it.
Speak to the Bronze Adult Dragon.
Recover the stolen scale collection from the eastern ruins.
The Bronze Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Brass Adult Dragon.
Answer the Brass Dragon's riddle correctly.
The Brass Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Copper Adult Dragon.
Collect 5 prismatic crystals from the caverns.
The Copper Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Silver Adult Dragon.
Rescue a captured dragon youngling from hunters.
The Silver Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Gold Adult Dragon.
Defeat the Red Dragon champion in single combat.
The Gold Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the White Adult Dragon.
Bring 5 ice crystals from the frozen tundra.
The White Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Black Adult Dragon.
Find a warrior's lost memento that speaks of despair.
The Black Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Green Adult Dragon.
Steal the gilded tome from the castle library.
The Green Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Blue Adult Dragon.
Defeat the Storm Elemental on the mountain peaks.
The Blue Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Speak to the Red Adult Dragon.
Destroy the rival's mountain stronghold.
The Red Dragon is satisfied. Quest complete.
Defeat all 10 adult dragon quests. The Ancient Platinum Dragon now speaks to you.
Carry the Peace Ring to the Ancient Chromatic Dragon and begin negotiations.
Return with the Chromatic Dragon's agreement.
Speak to the Ancient Chromatic Dragon.
Retrieve the Prism of Accord from the dead volcano.
The accord is sealed. The Dragon Peace Ring activates — it transports you back to Lloth. The ring then disappears.
Lloth told you: Sunny's tent ring is lost in the world. Find it using the Keys_ring search area.
Search the marked area (Keys_ring object layer) for Sunny's ring.
You found Sunny's Tent Ring! Wear it to access the tent portal. A gate guard blocks the exit — only ring-wearers pass.
The Drow Village Elder needs help with a creature in their fields.
Drive away the creature and return to the elder.
The village grants you their blessing. One of eight needed for Sunny to appear.
The Red Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Red Moon Village grants its blessing. 2 of 8 collected.
The Orange Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Orange Moon Village grants its blessing. 3 of 8 collected.
The Yellow Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Yellow Moon Village grants its blessing. 4 of 8 collected.
The Green Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Green Moon Village grants its blessing. 5 of 8 collected.
The Blue Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Blue Moon Village grants its blessing. 6 of 8 collected.
The Violet Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Violet Moon Village grants its blessing. 7 of 8 collected.
The Silver Moon Elder asks for your help resolving a local conflict.
Resolve the conflict and return.
The Silver Moon Village grants its blessing. 8 of 8 collected.
Collect all 8 drow village blessings.
Sunny, Ozzy, and Nymph appear. Speak to Sunny.
Sunny reveals she has become a demi-god. The family fades. Rich rewards rain down!

quests.name: Defeat the bandit leader in the eastern woods.

stages.description: Defeat the bandit leader in the eastern woods. (Quest from guard captain).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Collect rare spices: cinnamon bark, saffron thread, and peppervine root.

stages.description: Collect rare spices: cinnamon bark, saffron thread, and peppervine root. (Quest from head cook).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Recover the 3 missing books from the restricted library section.

stages.description: Recover the 3 missing books from the restricted library section. (Quest from librarian).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Find what has been eating the royal rose garden at night and stop it.

stages.description: Find what has been eating the royal rose garden at night and stop it. (Quest from gardener).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Find the guest's lost travel journal in the village.

stages.description: Find the guest's lost travel journal in the village. (Quest from castle guest 1).
Complete the task and return.

quests.name: Recover the stolen noble garments from the drying line.

stages.description: Recover the stolen noble garments from the drying line. (Quest from castle servant 1).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Deliver a sealed message to the blacksmith without being seen.

stages.description: Deliver a sealed message to the blacksmith without being seen. (Quest from castle servant 2).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Find the missing wine cellar key before the banquet.

stages.description: Find the missing wine cellar key before the banquet. (Quest from castle servant 3).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Track the escaped prisoner to the old mill.

stages.description: Track the escaped prisoner to the old mill. (Quest from castle warden).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.

quests.name: Recover the fool's cap stolen by a crow.

stages.description: Recover the fool's cap stolen by a crow. (Quest from castle jester).
Complete the task and return.
Task complete! The castle is grateful.
Read the bulletin board at Keys_quests_overworld. Multiple quests now available.
